items.title: Russian hackers used Signal app to deceive targets, German officials say
items.summary: Multiple warnings have already been issued regarding Russia-linked hackers and espionage agents using platforms such as Signal, Telegram, and WhatsApp for operations

items.title: Capital-A raises Rs 160 Cr in first close of Fund II
items.summary: The fund, which focuses on manufacturing startups, is targeting a total base corpus of Rs 300 crore, with a greenshoe option to selectively upsize to Rs 400 crore.
